name: Adamant DRI Processing and Minerals Group
summary: Adamant DRI Processing and Minerals Group, through its interest in Shenzhen Dingshang Technology Co., Ltd., provides a set of digital implementation plans for exhibition center display projects and display booths, and model designs for various exhibition centers and real estate. The company was incorporated in 2014 and is based in Shenzhen, the Peoples' Republic of China.
